name: @generata/coding
description: Plan-driven coding pipeline: interview, plan, audit, execute, review, commit. Optional Cloudflare deploy.

requiredBins.name: terminal-notifier
requiredBins.hint: Optional, macOS only: brew install terminal-notifier

requiredBins.name: wrangler
requiredBins.hint: Optional: npm i -g wrangler (only if using the cloudflare-deployer agent)

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token for run notifications

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat ID where notifications post

postInstall:
1. Edit generata.config.ts to set workDir (where projects/, plans/, metrics/ live)
  2. Try a workflow:
       pnpm generata workflow daily-plan
       pnpm generata workflow execute-plan --plan_name my-first

Notes:
  - cloudflare-deployer agent and deploy-project workflow are optional
  - ship-ticket / ship-from-slack live in @generata/work, not here
